title: Shallow Learning Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the simplified training process of a shallow neural network, highlighting the key steps and data flow.
elements: Shallow Neural Network (e.g., Single Hidden Layer)
relationships: Input data is fed into the network to produce a predicted output
The predicted output is compared to the true label to calculate an error
The error is used by the backpropagation algorithm to update the network's weights
The process repeats with updated weights for the next batch of data
